candidate_results.description: No order-parameter gauge vector; reproduces raw G row/column residual of K_SS.
Analytic BdG eta2 convention: W_left=[0,+2i delta0], W_right=[0,-2i delta0].
Same-sign negative imaginary diagnostic: W_left=[0,-2i delta0], W_right=[0,-2i delta0].
Same-sign positive imaginary diagnostic: W_left=[0,+2i delta0], W_right=[0,+2i delta0].
Legacy real same-sign comparison vector retained for diagnostics only.
W_left fitted so K_Geta + W_left K_etaeta = 0.
W_right fitted so K_etaG + K_etaeta W_right = 0.
Independent left/right W_eta vectors fitted from their own collective equations.
